source: figma-mcp get_metadata — variant axes parsed from COMPONENT symbol names
notes: Interaction axes (state) are design recipes, not React props — implement via CSS :hover/:focus/:active/disabled.
Boolean Figma values Yes/No/yes/no/on/off normalize to boolean in code.
Segmented Button page 587:1268 contains Group + Block; Group is the public API; Block is internal.
SegmentedButton: removed invented labelStyle + color (Group color=Primary only; labels always Body Semi Bold).
Code-only props carry a category and rationale so API divergences are explicit and auditable.

codeOnlyProps.name: children
codeOnlyProps.reason: React supplies the visible button label as children.

codeOnlyProps.name: startIconName
codeOnlyProps.reason: Code identifies the Figma start-icon instance by CADS icon name.

codeOnlyProps.name: endIconName
codeOnlyProps.reason: Code identifies the Figma end-icon instance by CADS icon name.

codeOnlyProps.name: disabled
codeOnlyProps.reason: Consumers need to select the Figma disabled state semantically.

codeOnlyProps.name: fullWidth
codeOnlyProps.reason: Responsive consumer layouts may stretch the control without changing its Figma visual variant.

codeOnlyProps.name: disabled
codeOnlyProps.reason: Consumers need to disable a close action when its host component is disabled.

codeOnlyProps.name: onClick
codeOnlyProps.reason: Invokes the host component's close or dismiss behavior.

codeOnlyProps.name: aria-label
codeOnlyProps.reason: The icon-only action requires an accessible name; code defaults it to Close.

notes: Figma has no disabled variant; code uses the shared disabled neutral text variable for native button disabled behavior.

block.notes: Internal building block; do not expose position/isActive as public group API.

codeOnlyProps.name: value
codeOnlyProps.reason: The group derives each internal Block isActive value from the selected option.

codeOnlyProps.name: defaultValue
codeOnlyProps.reason: Supports an uncontrolled initial selection while preserving the group API.

codeOnlyProps.name: onChange
codeOnlyProps.reason: Reports the selected option to React consumers.

codeOnlyProps.name: options
codeOnlyProps.reason: Code models the repeated Figma Block instances as option data.

codeOnlyProps.name: disabled
codeOnlyProps.reason: Consumers need to select the Figma disabled state semantically.

codeOnlyProps.name: aria-label
codeOnlyProps.reason: The radiogroup requires an accessible name that is not a visual variant axis.

labeled.notes: Maps to IconToggle label + optional secondToggle; ensure docs playground can exercise dual toggles.

codeOnlyProps.name: iconName
codeOnlyProps.reason: Code identifies the nested Figma icon instance by CADS icon name.

codeOnlyProps.name: defaultPressed
codeOnlyProps.reason: Supports an uncontrolled initial value for the Figma isOn state.

codeOnlyProps.name: onPressedChange
codeOnlyProps.reason: Reports isOn changes to React consumers.

codeOnlyProps.name: label
codeOnlyProps.reason: Maps the visible text in the related Icon Toggle + Label set.

codeOnlyProps.name: secondToggle
codeOnlyProps.reason: Maps the optional second instance in the related Icon Toggle + Label set.

codeOnlyProps.name: exclusive
codeOnlyProps.reason: Provides code-idiomatic mutual exclusion for a composed two-toggle control; Figma specifies visuals but not group behavior.

codeOnlyProps.name: disabled
codeOnlyProps.reason: Consumers need to select the Figma disabled state semantically.

codeOnlyProps.name: aria-label
codeOnlyProps.reason: Icon-only controls require an accessible name that is not a visual variant axis.

codeOnlyProps.name: label
codeOnlyProps.reason: React supplies the visible field label as content.

codeOnlyProps.name: helperText
codeOnlyProps.reason: React supplies helper / validation messaging text.

codeOnlyProps.name: helperIconName
codeOnlyProps.reason: Code identifies the default-sentiment helper icon by CADS icon name; sentiment overrides use fixed icons.

codeOnlyProps.name: showHelper
codeOnlyProps.reason: Consumers may hide helper chrome while keeping the label + control slot.

codeOnlyProps.name: children
codeOnlyProps.reason: The inputType slot nests any CADS control.

codeOnlyProps.name: htmlFor
codeOnlyProps.reason: Associates the label with a control id when children are not auto-wired.

codeOnlyProps.name: disabled
codeOnlyProps.reason: Propagates disabled styling/context to nested controls.

buildingBlock.notes: Internal chrome set. Public Text Input composes Field Wrapper + this building block. Figma extraSmall field height is 22px; code uses the shared 24px control height (accepted difference).

codeOnlyProps.name: color
codeOnlyProps.reason: Maps the building-block color axis (primary solid border vs secondary soft border).

codeOnlyProps.name: label
codeOnlyProps.reason: Maps Field Wrapper label content on the composed public Text Input.

codeOnlyProps.name: helperText
codeOnlyProps.reason: Maps Field Wrapper helper text on the composed public Text Input.

codeOnlyProps.name: helperIconName
codeOnlyProps.reason: Maps Field Wrapper default helper icon.

codeOnlyProps.name: sentiment
codeOnlyProps.reason: Maps Field Wrapper sentiment for validation messaging; error also drives the building-block error chrome.

codeOnlyProps.name: value
codeOnlyProps.reason: Controlled value; also derives Figma isFilled.

codeOnlyProps.name: defaultValue
codeOnlyProps.reason: Uncontrolled initial value; also derives Figma isFilled.

codeOnlyProps.name: onChange
codeOnlyProps.reason: Reports value changes to React consumers.

codeOnlyProps.name: error
codeOnlyProps.reason: Convenience alias that sets sentiment=error and building-block error chrome.

codeOnlyProps.name: rows
codeOnlyProps.reason: Multiline area height hint for textarea consumers.

dropdownButton.notes: Internal select trigger for role=input. Do not export standalone.

menuList.notes: Internal menu panel. Checklist includes Select all / Clear all action row.

menuItem.notes: Internal item. Axes include role, itemType (icon|checkbox|iconError), selected, state.

codeOnlyProps.name: label
codeOnlyProps.reason: Input role Field Wrapper label / action role button label.

codeOnlyProps.name: helperText
codeOnlyProps.reason: Input role Field Wrapper helper text.

codeOnlyProps.name: helperIconName
codeOnlyProps.reason: Input role Field Wrapper helper icon.

codeOnlyProps.name: sentiment
codeOnlyProps.reason: Input role Field Wrapper validation messaging.

codeOnlyProps.name: showHelper
codeOnlyProps.reason: Input role may hide helper chrome.

codeOnlyProps.name: options
codeOnlyProps.reason: Code models repeated Figma menu item instances as option data.

codeOnlyProps.name: value
codeOnlyProps.reason: Controlled selection for input role (string or string[] for checklist).

codeOnlyProps.name: onChange
codeOnlyProps.reason: Reports selection changes for input role.

codeOnlyProps.name: onAction
codeOnlyProps.reason: Reports action-menu item activation for action role.

codeOnlyProps.name: open
codeOnlyProps.reason: Controlled menu open state (Figma open is design-only).

codeOnlyProps.name: disabled
codeOnlyProps.reason: Selects the Figma disabled trigger state.

codeOnlyProps.name: color
codeOnlyProps.reason: Input trigger primary/secondary border; action trigger uses Button color.

codeOnlyProps.name: labelStyle
codeOnlyProps.reason: Maps Dropdown Button thick|thin label weight.

codeOnlyProps.name: startIconName
codeOnlyProps.reason: Optional start icon on the input/action trigger.

codeOnlyProps.name: aria-label
codeOnlyProps.reason: Accessible name when label is absent (especially action menus).

codeOnlyProps.name: width
codeOnlyProps.reason: Input-role layout control (hug = static width from longest option/placeholder; full; or CSS length). Not a Figma variant axis.

checkboxBlock.notes: Building block with size × state × status (unselected|selected|indeterminate). Prefer + Label publicly.

codeOnlyProps.name: label
codeOnlyProps.reason: Maps Figma text property Text#252:0 on Checkbox + Label.

codeOnlyProps.name: checked
codeOnlyProps.reason: Maps block status=selected vs unselected for controlled usage.

codeOnlyProps.name: disabled
codeOnlyProps.reason: Consumers select the Figma disabled state semantically.

radioBlock.notes: Building block with size × state × selected. Prefer + Label publicly.

codeOnlyProps.name: label
codeOnlyProps.reason: Maps Figma text property Text#260:41 on Radio Button + Label.

codeOnlyProps.name: checked
codeOnlyProps.reason: Maps block selected=yes/no for controlled usage.

codeOnlyProps.name: disabled
codeOnlyProps.reason: Consumers select the Figma disabled state semantically.

toggleBlock.notes: Building block with size × state × isOn. Prefer + Label publicly.

codeOnlyProps.name: label
codeOnlyProps.reason: Maps Figma text property labelText#327:41 on Toggle + Label.

codeOnlyProps.name: checked
codeOnlyProps.reason: Maps block isOn=on/off for controlled usage.

codeOnlyProps.name: disabled
codeOnlyProps.reason: Consumers select the Figma disabled state semantically.

codeOnlyProps.name: aria-label
codeOnlyProps.reason: Accessible name when the optional label is omitted.

sliderKnob.notes: Thumb chrome; interaction states are CSS recipes on the public Slider.

sliderBar.notes: Track fill geometry. percentFilled is a Figma demo axis; code uses numeric value.

sliderStepper.notes: Optional tick labels under the track when showStepper is true.

codeOnlyProps.name: label
codeOnlyProps.reason: Maps Figma text property labelText on Slider.

codeOnlyProps.name: helperIconName
codeOnlyProps.reason: Maps Figma helperIcon instance by CADS icon name.

codeOnlyProps.name: sentiment
codeOnlyProps.reason: Maps field-level state=error vs default; disabled is a separate prop.

codeOnlyProps.name: disabled
codeOnlyProps.reason: Consumers select the Figma disabled state semantically.

codeOnlyProps.name: value
codeOnlyProps.reason: Numeric slider value; replaces Figma Bar percentFilled demo axis.

codeOnlyProps.name: max
codeOnlyProps.reason: Range maximum. Defaults 100 for side and center.

codeOnlyProps.name: step
codeOnlyProps.reason: Step increment for continuous or discrete sliding.

codeOnlyProps.name: startsFrom
codeOnlyProps.reason: Maps related Slider Bar startsFrom=side|center. Center is bipolar around 0.

codeOnlyProps.name: width
codeOnlyProps.reason: Layout control (default 300px matches Figma symbol width). Not a Figma variant axis.

codeOnlyProps.name: fullWidth
codeOnlyProps.reason: Layout control (100% of parent). Not a Figma variant axis.

codeOnlyProps.name: stepCount
codeOnlyProps.reason: Maps related Slider Stepper stepCount when showStepper is true.

codeOnlyProps.name: onChange
codeOnlyProps.reason: Reports value changes to React consumers.

codeOnlyProps.name: aria-label
codeOnlyProps.reason: Accessible name when the optional label row is hidden.

codeOnlyProps.name: startIconName
codeOnlyProps.reason: Maps Figma startIcon name text property.

codeOnlyProps.name: endIconName
codeOnlyProps.reason: Maps Figma endIcon name text property.

codeOnlyProps.name: disabled
codeOnlyProps.reason: Consumers select the Figma disabled state semantically.

codeOnlyProps.name: aria-label
codeOnlyProps.reason: Accessible name override when label content is decorative.

notes: Figma color=selected (n/a) couples to selected=yes; code uses selected boolean + selected tokens only.

chip.notes: Atom used inside the group wrap; preferred public API is ChipGroup.

fieldWrapper.notes: Chip Group composes Field Wrapper for label + helper chrome.

codeOnlyProps.name: helperText
codeOnlyProps.reason: Maps nested Field Wrapper helper text.

codeOnlyProps.name: helperIconName
codeOnlyProps.reason: Maps nested Field Wrapper helper icon.

codeOnlyProps.name: options
codeOnlyProps.reason: Code models repeated Chip instances as option data.

codeOnlyProps.name: value
codeOnlyProps.reason: Multi-select selected values; Figma Chip selected axis is derived per option.

codeOnlyProps.name: disabled
codeOnlyProps.reason: Disables all chips in the group.

codeOnlyProps.name: aria-label
codeOnlyProps.reason: Accessible name for the chip group.

codeOnlyProps.name: children
codeOnlyProps.reason: React supplies the visible link label as children.

codeOnlyProps.name: href
codeOnlyProps.reason: Native anchor destination; Figma has no URL axis.

codeOnlyProps.name: disabled
codeOnlyProps.reason: Consumers select the Figma disabled state semantically.

codeOnlyProps.name: target
codeOnlyProps.reason: Window targeting for external links (often paired with isExternal).

codeOnlyProps.name: onClick
codeOnlyProps.reason: Optional click handler for SPA / button-like usage.

notes: Figma axis is `type` (primary|secondary), not color.
extraExtraSmall is Link-only (body/xxs 10/16); not on ControlSize.
Visited maps to CSS :visited (primary→brand-secondary; secondary→neutral-tertiary).

breadcrumbLinks.notes: Internal building block; public API maps items[].current / iconOnly / optional iconName on any crumb (not first-only home).

breadcrumbSeparators.notes: Internal chevron-right separator sized with trail.

breadcrumbOverflow.notes: Ellipsis overflow control composed with Dropdown; opens menu of truncated items on click.

codeOnlyProps.name: items
codeOnlyProps.reason: Code-idiomatic trail of crumb objects replacing Figma slot composition.

codeOnlyProps.name: maxItems
codeOnlyProps.reason: MUI-compatible. Triggers Breadcrumb Overflow when trail exceeds visible count. Default 8.

codeOnlyProps.name: itemsBeforeCollapse
codeOnlyProps.reason: MUI-compatible. Crumbs kept before Overflow ellipsis. Default 1.

codeOnlyProps.name: itemsAfterCollapse
codeOnlyProps.reason: MUI-compatible. Crumbs kept after Overflow ellipsis. Default 1 (Figma composition shows 2).

codeOnlyProps.name: expandText
codeOnlyProps.reason: Accessible name for Overflow trigger (MUI expandText). Default 'Show path'.

codeOnlyProps.name: aria-label
codeOnlyProps.reason: Accessible name for the breadcrumb nav.

notes: Accepted: slot-vs-items: Accepted code-idiomatic composition (same pattern as SegmentedButton options). (figma: Breadcrumbs uses a scoped slot of Links/Separators/Overflow.; code: Public API uses items[] + maxItems/itemsBeforeCollapse/itemsAfterCollapse; separators/overflow are composed internally.)
Overflow opens a dropdown of truncated pages (Figma), not MUI's in-place expand-all.

tabItem.notes: Building block only — do not export standalone Tab Item as public API.

codeOnlyProps.name: items
codeOnlyProps.reason: Code-idiomatic list of tab descriptors (label/icons/dismissible) replacing slot instances.

codeOnlyProps.name: value
codeOnlyProps.reason: Maps Tab Item isCurrent for the selected tab.

codeOnlyProps.name: onItemDismiss
codeOnlyProps.reason: Maps Tab Item isDismissible close affordance.

notes: Accepted: isCurrent-vs-value: Accepted — do not expose isCurrent on public Tabs API. (figma: Tab Item exposes isCurrent per instance.; code: Tab Group owns selection via value/defaultValue like SegmentedButton.)

closeIconButton.notes: Dismiss control composed inside Alert when isDismissible.

codeOnlyProps.name: iconName
codeOnlyProps.reason: Maps Figma text alertIcon / custom icon override.

codeOnlyProps.name: actionLabel
codeOnlyProps.reason: Label for the composed outlined secondary Button (always required when hasAction).

codeOnlyProps.name: actionStartIconName
codeOnlyProps.reason: Optional start icon on the locked action Button.

codeOnlyProps.name: actionEndIconName
codeOnlyProps.reason: Optional end icon on the locked action Button.

codeOnlyProps.name: fullWidth
codeOnlyProps.reason: Stretch alert to parent width (default true).

codeOnlyProps.name: role
codeOnlyProps.reason: ARIA role for the alert surface.

notes: Action Button is locked to outlined secondary; size maps large→medium, medium→small, small/XS→extraSmall.

closeIconButton.notes: Dismiss control composed inside Toast when isDismissible.

codeOnlyProps.name: iconName
codeOnlyProps.reason: Maps Figma text toastIcon / custom icon override.

codeOnlyProps.name: actionLabel
codeOnlyProps.reason: Label for the composed outlined secondary Button (always required when hasAction).

codeOnlyProps.name: actionStartIconName
codeOnlyProps.reason: Optional start icon on the locked action Button.

codeOnlyProps.name: actionEndIconName
codeOnlyProps.reason: Optional end icon on the locked action Button.

codeOnlyProps.name: role
codeOnlyProps.reason: ARIA role for the toast surface.

notes: Figma Toast sentiment=primary maps to brand chrome tokens (Alert/Banner use brand).
Action Button is locked to outlined secondary at small size.

codeOnlyProps.name: fullWidth
codeOnlyProps.reason: Stretch banner to parent width (default true).

codeOnlyProps.name: role
codeOnlyProps.reason: ARIA role for the banner region.

notes: title and description are required content props (Figma titleText / descriptionText).
Replaced stub Tag tone API with Figma color axis (includes pink/orange).
Figma startIcon defaults true; code defaults false so short text tooltips stay compact unless opted in.
Single placement axis is caretPlacement (Figma); no separate MUI placement prop.

popoverCore.notes: Content surface composed inside Popover; content axis from Core.

codeOnlyProps.name: content
codeOnlyProps.reason: Maps Figma Popover Core content axis (textOnly|textImage|custom).

codeOnlyProps.name: primaryActionLabel
codeOnlyProps.reason: Primary action Button label (Figma default Next).

codeOnlyProps.name: secondaryActionLabel
codeOnlyProps.reason: Secondary action Button label (Figma default Back).

codeOnlyProps.name: children
codeOnlyProps.reason: Optional trigger element or custom content.

notes: Public Popover merges Figma Popover (caret) + Popover Core (content). Popover Core is not a public export.

codeOnlyProps.name: isDismissible
codeOnlyProps.reason: Close control visibility (always present in Figma).

notes: Bottom sheet without page dimming (hideBackdrop).

codeOnlyProps.name: surfaceOnly
codeOnlyProps.reason: Fixture/docs: render surface with scrim, no portal.

notes: Spelling isDismissable matches Figma (not isDismissible).
Scrim uses fixed black 80% (Figma neutral/black-alpha/80), not theme-flipping alpha.

codeOnlyProps.name: surfaceOnly
codeOnlyProps.reason: Fixture/docs: render surface with scrim, no portal.

notes: Richer than Dialog: header bar + body + footer actions; image layouts for media-heavy flows.
